summary: Phase 18 Bulk WhatsApp Reminder Screen testing. Found and fixed 1 critical bug: missing Stack.Screen registration in _layout.tsx preventing the /bulk-reminders route from loading (showed 'Unmatched Route'). After fix, all features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: bulk-reminders route was missing from Stack.Screen list in /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx — caused 'Unmatched Route' error. Added: <Stack.Screen name='bulk-reminders' options={{ animation: 'slide_from_right' }} />
seed_data_creation: Test case (TEST/001/2025) + client (TEST_Ravi Kumar with phone) + hearing for tomorrow already present from prior iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 18 Bulk Reminders features verified: Dashboard Tomorrow's Hearings card shows Bulk Remind button, More tab TOOLS section has Bulk Reminders MenuRow, both navigate to /bulk-reminders. Screen shows hearing list with checkboxes, preview modal with editable WhatsApp message, confirm overlay after send, sent badge and progress text after marking sent. The _layout.tsx fix (missing route registration) was applied and is critical.
rca_of_issue: RCA: /app/frontend/app/bulk-reminders.tsx was created as a new screen but its route 'bulk-reminders' was not registered in the Stack navigator in _layout.tsx. Expo Router's file-based routing still requires explicit Stack.Screen declarations for proper navigation. Fix: Added <Stack.Screen name='bulk-reminders' options={{ animation: 'slide_from_right' }} /> to the Stack in _layout.tsx.
